privileged_info_summary: The task uses real data from Unsplash: primary image (photo-1518837695005-2083093ee35b, 1000x667px, 64.9% saturated) and fallback image (photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d, 1000x1500px, 69.4% saturated). If both downloads fail, a synthetic fallback creates an 800x600 image with 6 colored circles. The verifier checks for uniform hue shifts in the 20-170° range, saturation and brightness preservation (90-110%), and shift uniformity (std<30°). Both real images have abundant saturated pixels (far exceeding the 100-pixel minimum), making them suitable for HSV-based hue shift verification.
